base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of autotile_shore_edge_47_masks — a tile from 1986 dragon quest. Shore/river edge autotile masks — 47-mask subset transitioning between water and land. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Shore/river edge autotile masks — 47-mask subset transitioning between water and land; computed per cell based on 8-neighbor adjacency
